ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Despite all the thinking you've been doing, only 0.0001% of communism has been built. It's too great a task to undertake alone. You're going to have to *get organised*.
Zh: 尽管你考虑了那么多，但也只建立起0.0001%的康米主义。你独自承担不了这个重大的任务。你必须*找到组织*。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: I thought the shack was nice and cozy as-is.

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Does this mean I need to clean up my hostel room?
Zh: 那我是不是得打扫一下我旅社的房间了？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Judging from the state of my ledger, I don't think that’s possible.
Zh: 根据我账本的状况来看，那是不可能实现的。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: I'm ready, let's get to it.
Zh: 我准备好了，我们开始吧。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Your level of personal upkeep is irrelevant. All that matters is your commitment to *building the World Republic*.
Zh: 你个人的生活水平无关紧要。重要的是你对*建立世界共和国*的承诺。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: You must seek out your revolutionary brothers and sisters. Find out how much communism they've built. Then, together, maybe you'll be able to build as much as 0.0002% of communism.
Zh: 你必须找出革命同胞。弄清楚他们为建立康米主义做了多少努力。然后你们团结一致，也许就能建立0.0002%的康米主义了。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: But it won't be *easy*. Decades of persecution by Coalition authorities have driven the remaining communists of Martinaise *underground*.
Zh: 但这不是一件*容易*的事情。在联盟当局几十年来的迫害之下，马丁内斯剩余的那些康米主义者都转移到了*地下*。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

Zh: 他们住在地下？那些康米主义者不是人，他们是*鼹鼠人*！

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: I don't know if I want to go searching for mole people.
Zh: 我也不知道自己想不想去找那些鼹鼠人。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: But *I'm* part of the Coalition authorities! Have I been persecuting communists this whole time?
Zh: 可*我就是*联盟的一份子！难道我一直都在迫害康米主义者吗？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Will they help me fire up Mazov's Socialist Sausage Grinder?
Zh: 他们能帮我烧掉马佐夫的工人主义香肠绞肉机吗？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: How am I supposed to find them if they're hiding? (Proceed.)
Zh: 如果他们藏起来了，那要怎么才能找到他们呢？（继续。）

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: They're not 'mole people', they're your comrades in the *eternal class struggle*. It's your task to find and join them.
Zh: 他们不是‘鼹鼠人’，而是你*永恒的阶级斗争*中的同志。你的任务就是找到他们，加入他们。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Possibly? If you have been, it's only because you're a *double-agent*, acting in furtherance of your *long-term objectives*.
Zh: 也许吧？如果你迫害过，那只能说明你是个*双面间谍*，在为你的*长期目标*而奋斗。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Just between us, you may want to lay off this 'grind up the bourgeoisie' stuff. It's a bit off-putting, even to fellow communists.
Zh: 这件事就我们俩说说吧。你或许怀着“碾碎资产阶级”的想法。但即便是对你的康米主义者同胞来说，这种想法都令人十分反感。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

Zh: 好了，我准备好了，我们去寻找组织吧。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

Zh: 首先，你得找到马丁内斯剩余的康米主义者。在具有革命潜力的人身边时，你的鼻子会给你发出信号，让你*建立交流*。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: It's a smell you know all too well. Simultaneously repulsive and yet darkly appealing. Musty with a sharp tang, but also a remnant of lost sweetness. Like a rotting mango that's been swaddled in a coat from your grandfather's attic...
Zh: 你非常熟悉这种气味。虽然令人厌恶，可又具有黑暗的吸引力。它发出刺鼻的腐臭味，但又带有一丝残余的迷失般的甘甜。那气息就像你祖父阁楼上，包裹在外套里的一个烂芒果……

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: What you're smelling is your own body odour, of course. Nothing a shower and change of clothes couldn't fix.

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: People sometimes complain there are no real communists left in Martinaise, but you can smell their presence. They're out there, waiting for you to join them!
Zh: 有时候人们会说，马丁内斯已经没有真正的康米主义者了，但是你还是能嗅到他们的存在。他们在等着你的加入！

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation
En: Incidentally, during the waning days of the Antecentennial Revolution, a number of Revacholian communards constructed elaborate hideouts in abandoned root cellars, hollowed-out tree trunks, and even residential sewage tanks. This latter phenomenon gave rise to the early anti-communist slogan, 'The Future's Bright When You Flush Out the White!'
Zh: 顺便一说，在世纪前大革命衰落时期，一群瑞瓦肖公社社员在废弃的地窖里、中空的树干里和居民区的污水池里精心建造出藏身之地。后面这种情况还激发出了早期的反康米主义口号：“消除康米，未来光明！”

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Communist Quest Initiation

Zh: 很好。它们会让你变得更好更强。现在的你年老体衰，酷到上天应该很难了。不过如果找到香烟，然后抽上一口——立马原地爆炸！一步到位！秒变离经叛道的霸道总裁，秒变高深莫测的红龙，鼻孔里还能喷出炙热的烟雾！

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / dialogue cigarette stub

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / dialogue cigarette stub

Zh: 事情一天比一天失控。中心已经守不住了。虽然你努力去*缓和*并*牵制*这些能量，但是情况似乎越来越糟糕。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 这种事情听起来不像是我的工作。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 我该怎么做？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 可你见过他们吗？你怎么知道他们还在呢？最重要的是，你怎么知道他们是不是在等*你加入*呢？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 职责究竟*是*什么？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 那是最可怕的事情……

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 追求职责和拒绝职责是人类的天性。所以职责才会分散给各个不同的组织、机构、办公室和部门。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 换句话说，职责遍布整个官僚机构，所以没有人真的能说出*什么人对什么事情负责*。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 职责与*谁杀了谁*这种琐碎的事情无关。它关乎的是真正的问题：人类的福祉、大宗商品价格和向真正民主的过渡……

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 哇，哇，*哇*。职责不是什么*专权*。你不能把职责都揽在自己身上。职责是由正统权威分配的……

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 你根本不需要什么委员会，你就是法律。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 可我就是法律，这件事情我不能自己去做吗？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 我们真的有时间去做这些事吗？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 谁会加入这个委员会呢？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 感觉这样的责任对我来说太重了。我不想这样。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation
En: Really, Harry. You know in your lungs that true authority flows from institutions, not individuals. That's the single principle that separates civilisation from barbarism.
Zh: 真的，哈里。你内心深处其实知道，真正的权威来自于机构而非个人。这是划分文明与野蛮的唯一原则。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation
En: Come on. You know in your lungs that true authority flows from institutions, not individuals. That's the single principle that separates civilisation from barbarism.
Zh: 好了，你内心深处其实知道，真正的权威来自于机构而非个人。这是划分文明与野蛮的唯一原则。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation
En: Technicalities.
Zh: 技术。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 如果你想要自己做的事情被*认可*，就必须经历一段过程。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation
En: There is always time to follow best practices. Once someone's decided to *cut corners* for the sake of expediency, who knows what else they're capable of?
Zh: 你总有时间去遵循最佳实践。一旦有人为了一己私利而*抄捷径*，天知道那个人会做出什么别的事情？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation
En: Fun stuff, that's what they're capable of.
Zh: 有趣的地方就在于他们会做什么事。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 你的好哥们，那个警督，就是一个很好的着手点。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation
En: The one you seem so set on driving away, the lieutenant, is a natural place to start.
Zh: 被你赶走的那个警督就是一个很好的着手点。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 我们被赋予职责之后，会发生什么事情？

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Moralist Quest Initiation

Zh: 迅速而果断的行动。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

Zh: 不，不是这样的。*说真的*，我感觉好的不能再好了。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

Zh: 只是你的心脏总算把所有*思必得*都排出体外了，伙计。是时候再弄点回来了。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

Zh: 随你便了，你这个慢吞吞的，缩在壳子里的人。倒要看看没了活力，你还能做什么。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

Zh: 快速恢复啊，伙计！快速好转啊，兄弟！超级警探又回来了。

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

Zh: 它是力量，兄弟。是专业精神。它能让你感到重回青春，随时随地都能*查案*！准备向整个世界宣战！

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

Zh: 我觉得坤诺可能有思必得。我应该找他问问，然后又能精力爆棚了。（接受思想。）

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / speed hangover

ConvTitle: WHIRLING F2 ORB / Ultraliberal Quest Initiation
